name: Yuki
message: "The sound of the chime..."

name: Yuki
message: "The sound of the bell..."
That's right... Even at this kind of time, the school bell still rings...
I just didn't know because I never showed up to school at this time of day.

name: Yuki
message: "I don't really want to be in such a gloomy place."

name: Yuki
message: "This place... where it seems like people keep dying."
I'd fled from my house. At first, I wandered around the shopping district.
But I ran here after getting hit on by drunks and delinquents. It looked like I was about to be rounded up by the police along with them.
Even a place like this was better than that house.

name: Yuki
message: "Ugh!"

name: Yuki
message: "That was a hallucination! There's no way something like that can happen!"
Right. It was just an illusion.
Like the air had been carved out in the shape of a human... A creepy shadow.
It was an illusion.
I couldn't imagine it as anything else.
It unhinged me a little, seeing the same fingerprints that were on Takashima-san's desk.
And that's why I had that hallucination.
Even if it wasn't real, even if it was a hallucination, there was no way I could remain calm after seeing that.
In a way, that's what I wanted to believe.
Because if it wasn't a hallucination...
"I'll give you some of my power."

name: Yuki
message: "Ah."
Takashima-san said that right before she died.
Just before she died, she...
I was kissed by a dying person.

name: Yuki
message: "That kiss..."
Why is all of this happening?
Even her cell phone... Even her cell phone showed up in my room.
Why were her possessions coming to me?
Why was that... in my room?
The morning sun had risen.
I just sat in front of the gate, since I was afraid to go in the school building.

name: Yuki
message: "I wish I could nap a bit."
I started walking shakily.

name: Ayana
message: "Good morning, Minakami-san."

name: Yuki
message: "Good morning? I mean, I guess it is morning, but why are you here so early, Ayana-san?"

name: Ayana
message: "Dunno."

name: Yuki
message: "How could you not... Never mind."

name: Ayana
message: "Did you run away too, Minakami-san?"

name: Yuki
message: "What?!"

name: Yuki
message: "How do you..."

name: Ayana
message: "Because everyone ran away, just like that."

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean? Do you mean the people who went missing went through the same experience?"

name: Ayana
message: "Experience?"

name: Yuki
message: "I saw a black shadow. I think it was a hallucination, but I definitely saw a black shadow."

name: Yuki
message: "My room was covered in the same fingerprints that were on Takashima-san's desk, and Takashima-san's cell phone was in my room."

name: Ayana
message: "I see."

name: Yuki
message: "Did everyone else experience that too?"

name: Ayana
message: "It's very simple."

name: Ayana
message: "Your experiences are yours alone. That much is obvious."

name: Yuki
message: "That's not what I'm saying!"

name: Ayana
message: "Heh. What's wrong? This isn't like you, Minakami-san. Weren't you supposed to have a stronger spirit than anyone? Weren't you supposed to be smarter than anyone else?"

name: Yuki
message: "Wh-What's that? I'm nothing like that."

name: Ayana
message: "Really? But it was determined as such."

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean, 'determined'? You can't just determine something like that."

name: Yuki
message: "And who would determine something like that anyway? That sounds like something God himself might do."

name: Ayana
message: "It was not determined by God."

name: Yuki
message: "Then who?"

name: Ayana
message: "If God did not determine it, then humans did. That is all."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? I don't understand..."

name: Ayana
message: "You don't understand? That's just what you think right now."

name: Ayana
message: "After all, every answer is right here, and you are an existence that can either find those answers or ignore them."

name: Yuki
message: "What's... that?"

name: Ayana
message: "The Crawling Chaos."

name: Ayana
message: "It emerges from a dark place."

name: Ayana
message: "It creeps in every time you turn off the lights."

name: Ayana
message: "Everyone is incredibly scared."

name: Ayana
message: "People light lamps because they are scared."

name: Ayana
message: "The light illuminates the world."

name: Ayana
message: "And thus they try to forget."

name: Ayana
message: "But that is mistaken, for the stronger the light is..."

name: Ayana
message: "The brighter the lights of the world shine, the more vividly the shadow is cast."

name: Ayana
message: "Light can't eliminate the darkness. Light is founded upon the temptation of the darkness."

name: Ayana
message: "We try to eliminate it, because both its sightliness and unsightliness are as ambrosia to us."

name: Ayana
message: "The Crawling Chaos emerges from a dark place."

name: Ayana
message: "It emerges from the shadow in the belly of a cowering man."

name: Ayana
message: "From the shadow of a clenched fist."

name: Ayana
message: "The temptation is biding its time."

name: Ayana
message: "The hidden temptation is always at your side."

name: Ayana
message: "That which is hidden. That which tempts."

name: Yuki
message: "You said something like that before."

name: Ayana
message: "Yes. People try to uncover that which has been hidden."

name: Ayana
message: "But that is not an attempt to hide it and run away, but rather an attempt to hoard that sweet treasure away from others."

name: Ayana
message: "Just like Mamiya-kun."

name: Yuki
message: "Mamiya Takuji?"

name: Ayana
message: "You and Mamiya-kun are two figures that stand on opposite sides of the same door."

name: Ayana
message: "Just like the goddess who stands in the doorway, governing the beginning of every action."
A quiet voice.
Translucent eyes.
She seemed to know everything. She seemed to see everything.
My skin broke out into goosebumps.
But...

name: Ayana
message: "But this time you will advance beyond that."

name: Ayana
message: "And then you will stand at the end of the loop."

name: Ayana
message: "Next time we meet..."

name: Ayana
message: "Tell me what you see at the end."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"
Was I... sleeping just now?
Ouch...

name: Yuki
message: "My body hurts all over..."
Probably because I slept on the concrete like this.

name: Yuki
message: "But why..."
Why am I in a place like this?

name: Yuki
message: "I saw something like a black shadow."

name: Yuki
message: "I don't know if that was a hallucination or what, but I couldn't stay there after seeing that."
After wandering around the town, I arrived at this place.
And here, something...
Something happened.
It was...

name: Ayana
message: "Good morning."

name: Yuki
message: "I want to ask you something, Ayana-san."

name: Ayana
message: "What?"

name: Yuki
message: "The last thing I remember is you saying something really important."

name: Ayana
message: "The next time we meet, tell me what you saw at the end."

name: Yuki
message: "Um, this would count as the next time, but I still haven't seen anything."

name: Ayana
message: "I suppose so."

name: Yuki
message: "What's that supposed to mean?"

name: Ayana
message: "Well, that's something to look forward to next time."
She said that like it was a joke, but...
What's going on? I had no memory after that, and yet now my head was really clear.
The thought of that shadow passed through my mind, but even that didn't scare me.
Even though it was so scary last night, it didn't seem scary anymore.

name: Ayana
message: "The classroom."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah. I don't have any money, since I ran straight here. I have a 500 yen coin hidden in my desk, though."

name: Ayana
message: "Hidden?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, it's jammed in here, between the metal and the top board. Sometimes I forget my money, after all. It's one of the tricks you pick up in life."

name: Ayana
message: "I see."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Ayana
message: "What's wrong?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's weird."

name: Ayana
message: "It's not there?"

name: Yuki
message: "The money is there, but why are there books in Tsukasa's desk?"
When I crouched down to get the coin out of my desk, I saw into the desk diagonally in front of mine: Tsukasa's.
There were still textbooks left inside it.
I took one out.

name: Yuki
message: "This textbook is..."
That book was for a Thursday class, which was two days ago.
Why are these still in her desk after two days?

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?!"
I looked into Kagami's desk too.

name: Yuki
message: "It's the same."

name: Yuki
message: "This is..."

name: Ayana
message: "Why are you running all of a sudden?"

name: Yuki
message: "Sorry, there's something bothering me!"

name: Ayana
message: "I see."
Actually, that night, two days ago, their house was dark and the curtains were closed.
And yesterday too.
Which means...

name: Yuki
message: "It really is just the same."

name: Yuki
message: "The Wakatsuki sisters haven't been home."
I called the phone in their house.
If they were home, they'd answer.

name: Yuki
message: "Tch, no one's answering. Aren't their parents home?"
But no matter how you looked at it, they definitely hadn't been home.
I couldn't think of anything else.

name: Yuki
message: "I can't believe they've gone missing too."
Was I stupid? How could I have gone two days without realizing that?

name: Yuki
message: "What a dumbass. Blinded by fear, was I?"
There were plenty of hints.
If I'd noticed, I could've put a stop to it before this had happened.

name: Yuki
message: "I was afraid of something like this."
I picked up Takashima-san's bloody phone.
Why was I afraid of something like this?
Something like this...
Something...

name: Yuki
message: "There are..."
I hadn't noticed before because I was so scared.
I'd overlooked it.

name: Yuki
message: "There are..."
I took out the detective kit and got the fingerprints off the cell phone.

name: Yuki
message: "Those two sets of fingerprints are on this cell phone too."
I transferred them to the film and lined them up with the fingerprints I'd found on Takashima-san's desk.

name: Yuki
message: "Bingo."
Just like I thought.
The two sets matched up perfectly.

name: Yuki
message: "The fingerprints on her desk are the same as the ones on this phone."

name: Yuki
message: "The first set is Takashima-san's, but whose are the others?"
I headed back to the school.

name: Ayana
message: "Welcome home."

name: Yuki
message: "I'm back."

name: Ayana
message: "That was surprisingly fast."

name: Yuki
message: "I found a new hint, so I couldn't just stand around."

name: Ayana
message: "A hint?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah. There was one set of fingerprints in my room, but there were two sets of fingerprints on Takashima-san's desk."

name: Yuki
message: "That's not a mystery in itself, but for some reason there are five sets on Takashima-san's phone."

name: Yuki
message: "The fingerprints that we know are on the phone are mine, Tachibana-san's, Ms. Kiyokawa's, and of course Takashima-san herself. The last set is unknown."

name: Yuki
message: "Even if we assume Takashima-san's ghost or zombie or whatever came to my room and left her phone there..."

name: Yuki
message: "In that case, why is there only one set of fingerprints in my room, while there are a bunch of different ones on the phone. There's no good explanation."

name: Yuki
message: "You can only call it unnatural."

name: Yuki
message: "Which means..."

name: Ayana
message: "Which means?"
I took a sample of the suspicious fingerprints from the desk.
Who would pull a trick like that in my room?
Of course, it could've been Mamiya Takuji, or one of his followers. Tachibana-san, or one of the people I saw on the message board.
I got the fingerprints I was looking for.

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, look. It was the savior himself."

name: Ayana
message: "The savior himself?"

name: Yuki
message: "Look."
I showed her the four pieces of film.
First, the one I took from Takashima-san's desk.
Second, the one from my room.
Third, the one from Takashima-san's phone.
And finally...

name: Yuki
message: "These fingerprints are from Mamiya Takuji's desk."

name: Yuki
message: "No one but him has touched it, so they're the only fingerprints on the desk."
I laid the fourth sheet down.

name: Yuki
message: "The answer is simple."

name: Yuki
message: "It wasn't Takashima Zakuro's ghost that went into my room, messed it up, and left the phone."

name: Yuki
message: "It was Mamiya Takuji."

name: Yuki
message: "Jeez, I can't believe I got worked up about that. I'm such a dumbass."

name: Yuki
message: "I got scared of something silly like this and couldn't look at it as anything other than an object of fear, even when there were so many hints lying around."

name: Yuki
message: "It even made me see that hallucination."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahh, I'm an idiot."

name: Ayana
message: "Heh, heheh."

name: Ayana
message: "You've returned to being the Minakami Yuki I know."

name: Yuki
message: "Hahaha. Once you get rid of all the smoke and mirrors, it's almost comical how silly this whole thing is."

name: Ayana
message: "I see."

name: Yuki
message: "Which means this was all devised by Mamiya Takuji."

name: Ayana
message: "All?"

name: Yuki
message: "It all matches up."

name: Ayana
message: "I see."

name: Yuki
message: "Though I still have to hear it from him to make sure."

name: Yuki
message: "If Mamiya was behind it all..."

name: Yuki
message: "Then the Wakatsuki sisters were abducted by him."

name: Yuki
message: "Where could they be?"

name: Ayana
message: "It was all devised by Mamiya Takuji."

name: Ayana
message: "Isn't that the simplest explanation?"

name: Ayana
message: "Mamiya-kun became friends with the Chaos."

name: Ayana
message: "He made it dark so that the Crawling Chaos could come more easily."

name: Yuki
message: "Dark?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes, Nyarlathotep likes the dark."

name: Ayana
message: "That's something you know very well."

name: Yuki
message: "Something I know?"

name: Yuki
message: "You mean the place?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes, Mamiya-kun has always had a place."
A dark place...

name: Yuki
message: "Oh!"

name: Yuki
message: "Mamiya's place..."

name: Yuki
message: "The place where Mamiya suddenly appeared."

name: Yuki
message: "There..."

name: Yuki
message: "That was... next to the old pool."

name: Yuki
message: "It's there!"

name: Yuki
message: "Thank you, Aya―"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? Ayana-san?"
What the...
Ayana-san was already gone.

name: Yuki
message: "But that's not what's important. The pool!"

name: Yuki
message: "The old pool, huh? That's where he is."
It was my blind spot.
But if you thought about it, it wasn't impossible.
Last year, our school had an indoor pool installed, so this one wasn't used anymore.
So it hadn't been filled with water in over a year.
I descended into the pool and found a manhole at my feet.

name: Yuki
message: "This manhole..."
The scratches on the edges of the manhole cover were relatively new.
If it hadn't been used in a year, the scratches would've rusted, but the ones on it seemed fresh.

name: Yuki
message: "This is proof someone opened it recently."
It must've been opened and shut again very recently.
There were only a few possible reasons for that.
The first thing that came to mind was the possibility that a workman opened it to check something.
But sadly, that didn't fit.
There would be scratches just like these on the other sewer entrances, but there was nothing like that on the rest of them.
There was no evidence that any of the other manhole covers had been touched.

name: Yuki
message: "And that's not all."
What was really unnatural was that rainwater was collecting in the pool, which meant the pool's drainage valve was closed.

name: Yuki
message: "I thought it was a little strange that rainwater was collecting in the pool."

name: Yuki
message: "If a workman had done something, that's the first thing he would have fixed."

name: Yuki
message: "Someone has intentionally stopped the water from flowing down into the sewers."
Why would someone do that?
There was definitely a drainage tank below the pool.
Apparently these tanks were actually large enough for someone to live in.
I saw on TV that sometimes homeless people lived in empty gasoline tanks after the gas stations went bankrupt.
If people could live in a gasoline tank, it wasn't improbable to think that someone might live in a drainage tank.

name: Yuki
message: "It was so strange when Mamiya kept appearing here."

name: Yuki
message: "Why didn't I notice something so simple?"
Well then...
I checked to make sure I still had my nightstick to protect myself.

name: Yuki
message: "With this, I can handle several attackers at once, as long as they're amateurs and the space is narrow."
It was definitely narrow. You could even have called this guerrilla warfare. And this was a surprise attack.

name: Yuki
message: "No problem."
It took all my strength to lift the cover off the manhole.

name: Yuki
message: "It smells like shit."
The gaping manhole looked like the entrance to hell itself.

name: Yuki
message: "This is probably Mamiya's hideout."
And his followers were totally crazy.
This smell probably wasn't poison or anything, but I wouldn't have put it past them to try to stab me.

name: Yuki
message: "But I have to go."
I started descending down into the manhole.

name: Yuki
message: "I can't see anything, since my eyes aren't used to this. This is really scary."
My breath had quickened.
I had to calm down. If I couldn't see, the rest of my senses had to be as sharp as possible.
If my breathing was too loud, it could stop me from hearing something vital.
If I started sweating, my sense of touch could be dulled.
I needed to calm down and hone my senses.

name: Yuki
message: "The sound of water..."

name: Yuki
message: "This should be where the drain connects to the sewer."

name: Yuki
message: "The sewers are a lot wider than I expected."
My eyes slowly adjusted to the darkness.
A little light filtered in from the open manhole.

name: Yuki
message: "This is a really old style of sewer."
It smelled really bad.
Being here for very long would be nothing but torment.

name: Yuki
message: "Um, the drainage tank is..."
I looked around, searching for the path.
But the only way forward seemed like the wrong way.

name: Yuki
message: "There's no way the tank is in the direction where the water level rises."
The drainage tank should be in the opposite direction, where the water level drops.
But when I looked over there, I couldn't see anything but a dead end.

name: Yuki
message: "Why?"
I started walking and gradually began to see a light.

name: Yuki
message: "This is..."
The light was from the manhole.

name: Yuki
message: "I'm back where I started."

name: Yuki
message: "What's going on?"
No matter how far I walked, I couldn't find the drainage tank.

name: Yuki
message: "I'm tired. Haa..."
I sat down in that spot.

name: Yuki
message: "I should've worn a shorter skirt. The hem is pretty disgusting now."
I let out a loud sigh.

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm?"

name: Yuki
message: "What's that?"

name: Yuki
message: "It's like..."

name: Yuki
message: "I can hear voices from inside."
This...

name: Yuki
message: "This is..."

name: Yuki
message: "Is someone crying?"

name: Yuki
message: "It's coming from inside."
I was so stupid.
Why hadn't I noticed it?
Once I thought about it, I realized there couldn't be a dead end in a sewer.
It wasn't a dungeon. A sewer is a place where water is supposed to flow. A dead end would be a serious problem.
It had to be...

name: Yuki
message: "This spot has been blocked."
I started looking around the spot I'd assumed to be a dead end.

name: Yuki
message: "This is..."
It was like a hatch with a large, screw-shaped handle on it.
I pressed my ear up against it.

name: Yuki
message: "This is... Tsukasa's voice."

name: Yuki
message: "Which means..."
I wonder how many people there are inside.
What would happen if I suddenly rushed in?
What if there are more than ten people inside?
Those thoughts rushed through my mind, but the second I heard her voice, I dashed inside.

name: Yuki
message: "No one's here."

name: Yuki
message: "But more importantly..."

name: Yuki
message: "Tsukasa's not here. Where is she?"
I looked around the cramped drainage tank.
And...

name: Yuki
message: "There's a manhole in the ceiling. Is this the entrance?"
This was different from the one I came in. There was a manhole on the ceiling of the drainage tank.

name: Yuki
message: "That manhole is open."
Was that the sound of someone crying?

name: Yuki
message: "Ah!"

name: Yuki
message: "What's... this?"

name: Yuki
message: "What is this?"
A ridiculously huge space opened up before my eyes.
The concrete columns seemed to stretch on forever.

name: Yuki
message: "This isn't outside, though it is a pretty massive space."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, this is the new school building, which means this is beneath the new pool's foundation."

name: Yuki
message: "So it was built on top of the old pool's drainage tank."
Maybe they left it because they were considering using the old pool's tank for the new pool.

name: Yuki
message: "But they didn't actually use it."

name: Yuki
message: "So that's it."

name: Yuki
message: "That voice..."

name: Yuki
message: "Tsukasa!"
Tsukasa didn't respond to my voice.
It was like her voice was seeping out of the walls around me.

name: Yuki
message: "Tsukasa, where are you?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Tsukasa!"
Just how massive is this place?
This might not be connected to just the new building, but the old building as well.
I walked through the darkness.
I couldn't tell where her voice was coming from because of the echo.

name: Yuki
message: "Tsukasa!"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?!"
I felt something unpleasantly slimy under my feet.
I'd felt something like this before.

name: Yuki
message: "Tsukasa!"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?!"
My mind couldn't take in the sight before my eyes.
I'd never seen something like that before.
Even when Mrs. Senagawa died, it didn't cover that great an area.
It was a lake of blood.
The cold concrete was stained. The entire area was stained with red blood.
And right in the middle of that red floor...
Therein laid Kagami's tragic form.

name: Yuki
message: "What?!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Onee-chan... Onee-chan..."

name: Yuki
message: "Wh-What is this?"

name: Yuki
message: "Th-This has to be a joke."

name: Yuki
message: "This can't..."
Every time I took a step, the sticky blood made a disgusting sound.
All of this... came out of Kagami.
All of this was once inside Kagami.
And now it's been scattered throughout the room like this.

name: Yuki
message: "Hey, Kagami..."
I put my hand on Kagami's face.
It was so cold and hard that it didn't even seem human.
It didn't seem like a human's face.

name: Yuki
message: "This has to be a lie..."

name: Yuki
message: "This can't be... Hey, Kagami..."
There was no light in her eyes.
The whites and pupils of her eyes were both clouded over.
No light could possibly be reflected from those eyes.

name: Yuki
message: "It's a lie, a lie, a lie, a lie, a lie, a lie, a lie, a lie!"

name: Yuki
message: "That can't be true, can't be true, can't be true, that can't be true, that can't be true, that can't be true!"

name: Yuki
message: "That can't be..."
Her arms and legs had been cut off, like a Daruma doll.
The places where they had been severed were still jagged, like someone had stabbed and slashed at it with a knife until they could forcibly tear it off.

name: Yuki
message: "I'm sorry... If I... If I'd noticed sooner..."

name: Yuki
message: "I'm sorry. I'm sorry. It hurt, didn't it? It hurt, right? I'm sorry, Kagami..."

name: Yuki
message: "I'm sorry... I'm sorry... I'm sorry... It hurt, didn't it? It hurt, didn't it?... Did it hurt?"

name: Yuki
message: "Kagami... Kagami... Kagami, Kagami, Kagami, Kagami..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Everyone said... she was a demon..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "They said... you have to cut a demon to pieces..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Onee-chan wanted to go home..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "She asked to go home so many times..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "It hurt so bad... when they cut off her arms, but all the way till the end, she kept saying she wanted to go home... She wanted to go home..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Onee-chan..."

name: Yuki
message: "That's right..."

name: Yuki
message: "Kagami... let's go home."
I picked up Kagami.
Was she always so light?
It felt like I was holding a doll. Her body felt that light.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yuki..."

name: Yuki
message: "Let's go... home."

name: Yuki
message: "Back then, I carried you home on my back like this, didn't I?"

name: Yuki
message: "That time, you tried too hard, and sprained your ankle running."

name: Yuki
message: "I came right away when I heard about it from Tsukasa."

name: Yuki
message: "And then, this is what you said."

name: Kagami
message: "Your back... is so soft."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, of course. I am a girl, after all."

name: Kagami
message: "Yeah... That's right. You're a girl..."

name: Kagami
message: "Your back was always soft. Back then, too."

name: Yuki
message: "Back then?"

name: Kagami
message: "Yeah, when John died, too."

name: Yuki
message: "John? Oh, your dog."

name: Kagami
message: "Yeah."

name: Yuki
message: "I remember you saying you were going to go out and look for his spirit."

name: Kagami
message: "Yeah, I thought I could bring him back to life if I found where his spirit had run off to."

name: Yuki
message: "How would you do that?"

name: Yuki
message: "Where were you going to go looking, anyway?"

name: Kagami
message: "I don't know."

name: Kagami
message: "It's just... there was a big hill we could never get past."

name: Kagami
message: "I thought John's spirit might've been there waiting for us if we made it."

name: Yuki
message: "A big hill?"

name: Kagami
message: "Yeah, the big hill on the way to school."

name: Yuki
message: "Was it really that big?"

name: Kagami
message: "Not now it isn't, but back then it was."

name: Kagami
message: "When I was child, it seemed so big."

name: Kagami
message: "I thought it was the wall at the end of the world."

name: Kagami
message: "I thought if I could just get to the top of that hill, it would be the limit of the world."

name: Kagami
message: "But I was wrong."

name: Kagami
message: "When I got to the top..."

name: Kagami
message: "There was more of the city, just like here."

name: Kagami
message: "There was a hill after that, and another after that one too."

name: Kagami
message: "The city continued on forever."

name: Kagami
message: "That was when I realized the world had no end."

name: Yuki
message: "Wasn't that when you started crying?"

name: Kagami
message: "Yeah."

name: Kagami
message: "Because that's when I knew John's spirit wasn't coming back."

name: Kagami
message: "So I got sad."

name: Kagami
message: "And then you came, Yuki."

name: Kagami
message: "That's how it always was."

name: Kagami
message: "You always came for me when I was crying."

name: Kagami
message: "Because I'm always crying... Because I can't do anything..."

name: Kagami
message: "So I wanted to become stronger..."

name: Kagami
message: "I tried to be stronger."

name: Yuki
message: "I know you did, but maybe you tried too hard."

name: Kagami
message: "I'm no good, huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's not true. I'm still amazed at how hard you tried. I can't do something like that."

name: Kagami
message: "Ahaha..."

name: Kagami
message: "I always thought that your back was nice and hard. Big and strong."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? What do you mean?"

name: Kagami
message: "Like a father. No, even bigger. It was so big and strong that it seemed to envelop and protect me."

name: Kagami
message: "So I was surprised when your back was so soft."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, right, you still didn't know I was a girl at that point."

name: Kagami
message: "Yeah. But really, I was relieved."

name: Yuki
message: "Relieved?"

name: Kagami
message: "Yeah. My favorite person's back was soft and small, but that was the back I loved."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, of course a girl's back is going to be softer than a boy's."

name: Kagami
message: "Yeah, so I thought it was good that you were a girl."

name: Yuki
message: "What's good about it? Not like I could change it."

name: Kagami
message: "Dummy. That's not what I'm saying."

name: Kagami
message: "But then I'd never be able to get married."

name: Kagami
message: "Could you love me just a little?"

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean?"

name: Kagami
message: "Ahh, you're so stupid! Stupid, stupid, stupid! Shut up and walk!"

name: Yuki
message: "Wh-What is it this time? Jeez."
Kagami...
Sorry.
In the end, my small back...
Wasn't able to protect you.
Kagami...

name: Yuki
message: "Kagami, we're home."

name: Yuki
message: "Your parents are probably going to be really sad when they see what's happened to you."

name: Yuki
message: "But you said you wanted to go home, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "Kagami..."
Tsukasa rang the doorbell, since my hands were full.
I heard footsteps in the house.

name: Old Lady
message: "Yes?"
Silence.
The woman opened the door with a cheerful voice.
But that voice quickly disappeared, and only silence remained.
Since what I was holding... was Kagami.

name: Old Lady
message: "E-Excuse me?"

name: Yuki
message: "Please forgive me... I... I couldn't protect Kagami."

name: Yuki
message: "I let them do this to her!"

name: Yuki
message: "I'm so sorry!"

name: Old Lady
message: "Yes?"

name: Old Lady
message: "E-Excuse me?"

name: Yuki
message: "Please forgive me... I couldn't protect Kagami."

name: Yuki
message: "I let them do this to her!"

name: Yuki
message: "I'm so sorry!"

name: Old Lady
message: "Who are you?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Old Lady
message: "Is something wrong with your doll?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "What's happening?"

name: Old Lady
message: "Um... What are you talking about?"

name: Yuki
message: "No, that's not it. This was Kagami just a second ago. Wakatsuki Kagami-san."

name: Old Lady
message: "Is that the doll's name?"

name: Yuki
message: "No, that's not it. Kagami lives here, right? She's your daughter."

name: Old Lady
message: "Um, it's getting pretty late. If you don't mind, I'd really rather not keep talking like this."

name: Yuki
message: "But, Mrs. Wakatsuki!"

name: Old Lady
message: "Um... We're the Hasegawa family, not Wakatsuki."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Old Lady
message: "Um... If you don't leave, I'm going to have to call the police."

name: Yuki
message: "What's this?"

name: Yuki
message: "What's happening?"

name: Yuki
message: "I don't..."

name: Yuki
message: "Tsukasa!"
I turned back toward Tsukasa.

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?!"
Th-This... What?
It looked like the place where Tsukasa had been standing had been chiseled out. It was dyed pure black.
A shadow...
A crawling figure... that couldn't hold a human shape.
That's...

name: Yuki
message: "Eek!"
It yelled something.
It definitely yelled something in an inhuman voice.
It made a sound that wasn't a sound.
I definitely heard it raise its voice in an unholy scream.
